summary:
Perfect! All tests passed. The issue was that the Go code was using the old column name "status" but the database migration had renamed it to "order_status". I fixed both the INSERT and SELECT queries to use the correct column name "order_status".

The fix was made in `/workspace/app/main.go`:
- Line 110: Changed `INSERT INTO orders (user_id, total, status, shipping_address)` to `INSERT INTO orders (user_id, total, order_status, shipping_address)`
- Line 112: Changed `RETURNING id, user_id, total, status, shipping_address, created_at` to `RETURNING id, user_id, total, order_status, shipping_address, created_at`
- Line 130: Changed `SELECT id, user_id, total, status, shipping_address, created_at` to `SELECT id, user_id, total, order_status, shipping_address, created_at`
